data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protect data in transit and at rest using robust encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: Implement TLS for data transit and AES-256 for stored data encryption.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Deploy solutions to detect and prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Use anomaly detection models based on user behavioral analytics.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conduct periodic reviews of security protocols and infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Implement automated vulnerability scanning and penetration testing.

data.title: Access Control Management
data.description: Ensure only authorized personnel can access sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Use role-based access controls (RBAC) and multi-factor authentication (MFA).

data.title: Data Breach Response Plan
data.description: Prepare a comprehensive plan to respond to potential data breaches swiftly.
data.technical_spec: Establish a communication protocol and conduct drills to test the response plan.
